name: eagle_gyw
description: Real 2-layer board exported from Autodesk Eagle: both copper layers, both masks, both silkscreens, top paste, a profile (outline) and a plated drill file.
notes:
Second CAD dialect in the corpus (Eagle). Kept small deliberately so the corpus stays fast. Files were renamed to conventional extensions (copper_top.gbr -> board.gtl and so on) so layer classification is by extension; contents are byte-identical to upstream.

Not asserted: silkscreen_clearance, silkscreen_over_mask_defined_pads and solder_mask_expansion, which fail on EVERY real board in this corpus -- see #19.
